Title: 60 (Epic Quests, Episodes 1-3)
SubTitle: Epic path quests
Good Tank:
## Episode 1

1️⃣ **Speak with the Assistant Recruiter in Klick'Anon**, then speak with the Recruiter.

2️⃣ You are sent to **Palidan Talimas in Thedruk (NE)**. You can find him N/E across the river from The Druk tunnel, at the bottom of a hill beside a tree. To find Palidan Talimas, head East from Teth to the river; as soon as you cross the bridge, follow the river south. Talimus is on the other side of the 3rd hill you come to.

Talimas requires **2 crystals** off Takesir Miners, located in **The Great Waste (W)**. This part of the quest cannot be soloed easily, as they are level 60, varying from melees to casters.

3️⃣ The Coldwind Guard of Halas has asked for assistance: Goblin invasion armies are currently attacking the Treants in **Guardian Forest (W) and (NW)**. They must be stopped before the Treants are defeated, as Halas will be their next target. You need to slay the goblins to protect both the Treants and the Coldwind Guard of Halas. Loot **two Enchanted Warbeads** from Goblin Soothsayers and Assassins.

4️⃣ Return to Palidan Talimas with the beads. You are sent deep into Guk to speak with the **Froglok Herbalist**. The herbalist is at the bottom, past two bridges, just to the right of the latter one. See Map.

He asks for **3 ingredients**:
- Spotted tongue: Frogluk Channelers/Forgers
- Swamp water: Frogluk Channelers/Forgers
- Mycanoid spores: Fungal Cavaliers/Hunters

Talking to the Herbalist with your ingredients will initiate an event in which you must protect the herbalist. Every five minutes, 2 mobs will spawn — this will occur for 3 rounds. In other words, you will see the first 2 mobs every fifteen minutes. This will last for about an hour.

The order in which they spawn is:
- Two Watchmen
- Two Guardsmen
- A Lookout and a Scout

Their cons:
- Watchmen: dark blue
- Guardsmen: white
- Lookout/Scout: yellow/red respectively

Eventually, **Bouncers** will spawn — they con red and are very difficult. They are **NOT** to be underestimated! ⚠️

During the chaos, the herbman will give you a teleportation shard and will later port you to **Guk (S)**, where a human spawns. Upon speaking to him, he will give you a potion.

**NOTE:** If the herbman dies while you are making potions, you will have to wait until someone else triggers the event. Since the popups have an Area of Effect, your quest will still be advanced if you have the necessary items in your inventory.

Return to Paladin Talimas.

---

## Episode 2

Speak to **Paladin Talimus (Thedruke NE)**. He sends you to FP to stop some bandits. They spawn just outside the North entrance by the signpost on the road. Be sure to have **200 tunar** on you. When they spawn, be sure to get two pop-ups that they have stolen 100 tunar from you twice (they don't aggro). Kill the named bandit and loot the coin purse. Return to Paladin Talimus.

Paladin Talimus sends you to **Diren Hold** to speak to Jakai and learn about justice (fort on top of the mountain). Jakai sends you in search of **3 items** — 2 swords and a ring. All items are obtained from the chests at the siren camps. Farm keys to open chests. If you farm a key that doesn't open the chests, don't delete it; it will open a chest at another location.

- Ring — Vastly Deep (E)
- Sword — West Toxx (SW)
- Sword — Kerra Isle (SW)

***NOTE:*** While in sirens, kill the Plagued Siren and loot its gland. You'll need this later to debuff **"An Ancient Corpse"**.

Each camp contains eight mobs — two sets of four — with a treasure chest located (blank con) in the middle of each set. Farming the sirens will yield an NTL key. Farm sirens until you have all 3 waterlogged keys (if you go to loot one and it says you already have it in your inventory, then it is the same waterlogged key as you already have; keep farming until you have all 3 waterlogged keys in your inventory).

Once you have all 3 keys, try the keys at each different Siren Camp to open the chests.

Return to Jakai with all three items.

Jakai sends you to pass judgment on **Calidux** at Qeynos Prison (bottom of the main building). Speak to Calidux and he tells you his version of things and about an undead menace. He gives you a choice to either find a toxic gland for a debuff potion or to simply slay the beast. If you choose to find the gland, it drops off a rare spawn (Plagued Siren) in Kerra Isle (SW). Return to Calidux with it.

***Highly recommend getting this debuff potion*** ✅

If you chose to slay him, you can still obtain the debuff potion by farming the gland and returning it to Calidux.

The undead menace is a mob named **"An Ancient Corpse"** and is located in Basher's Enclave (N). This mob is on a trigger and despawns after about 20 minutes if not engaged. You can re-trigger him by returning to Calidux and choosing **"I failed he's nowhere in sight"**. He respawns in about a half hour. Debuffed, this mob still resists most nukes, so it is better to have petters. Tank, healer, and several petters take him out with no problem. This mob was about as easy as Graal the Leviathan. Buffed, this mob will require a raid party. He drops 4 NTL items. Loot and return to Calidux.

Calidux then proceeds to whip your ass! He is easily 1-grouped (don't try to solo; he doesn't do much damage, but when he casts his pet you are toast). He drops 2 NTL items. Loot and return to Jakai for **30 Mil XP and 10K tunar**. You will return to Jakai for Episode 3.

---

## Episode 3

After talking to Jakai, she tells you to speak with Shinlos and follow his instructions, and you find out your character is prejudiced.

Shinlos is right outside of the North Gate of Freeport. Walk out the gate, follow the outside wall west, and go straight until you see him. If you get to the giant mountain range, you just passed him. If you get to the highwaymen, you're way off.

Only one person can speak to him at a time, so if he isn't around, someone is doing this part of the quest.

When you talk to him, he tells you to go off and wait in the distance by some palm trees. To get there, run NW until you see two palm trees fairly close to each other. If you are at the right trees, you will get a pop-up telling you to stay there. If you don't get the pop-up, keep looking until you do. If you cross the trail/road, you've gone too far.

This part involves no fighting, so you can come alone. After 15 minutes of waiting by the tree, an NPC will start screaming for help. Talk to her and she'll tell you her little brother is missing and will die or something if you don't help. **Say no to every request for help or you will fail the quest.** After a while she'll say "He is dead" and leave. Wait about 15 minutes for the next event.

Next, a treasure chest will spawn and you'll get a pop-up asking if you want to open it — say no. Once the treasure chest disappears, wait 15 more minutes for the next event. Finally, a demon will spawn and ask you to kill him. If he doesn't talk to you, you MUST move closer to it. He says he won't fight back and that he has "great loot" — say no once again to everything he asks. Eventually he'll float away and you must wait another 15 minutes before getting another pop-up. Once you get the pop-up, run back to Shinlos and talk to him.

This part is kind of hard. You must go to **Cape Dreg** and rescue Shinlos' sister. There are many islands with indigo pirates; you are looking for the island with the giant ship docked in front, leading into a cave. For this part, it is recommended you bring about 15–20 people, or as many raging rhinos as you can. Going into the cave, there will be a section of the floor you can fall into — do it, and you'll land in the room where you should get a pop-up saying it seems like someone is hiding in here. Then 5 or 6 things will spawn and attack.

**Wave Order:**
1st wave: Spirits of Syndar's — weak against PR/DR (from what casters said)
2nd wave: Syndar manifestations — weak against CR (from what casters said)
3rd wave: Spirits of Syndar's — weak against FR (from what casters said)
4th wave: Syndar manifestations — weak against PR/DR (from what casters said)
5th wave: Syndar incantations (unknown weakness)

They range from dark blue to yellow and don't hit very hard on tanks, but have tons of HP. You must hurry and kill them as quickly as possible because you have started a timer that cannot be stopped. Whether or not they're dead, another wave of 5 or 6 will spawn, harder than the first wave. Repeat until **Synder of the Indigo** spawns. This guy is bad — with 4k AC he quads for 1k and nukes. MT him; with rhinos he won't be much problem.

Gokukicks says: Synder debuffs your FR by 125 and has an FR-based proc, so his quads are very high once he debuffs you. Overmax your FR by 125 and he's easy to tank.

Once he is dead, collect his loot, **TALK TO HIS GHOST** (spawns in the cubby under the ramp; the ghost despawns quickly), and go talk to Shinlos.

**Note:** If you think you've gotten all the popups, looted the necklace, and the ghost won't talk to you, back out of the cubby and roam around the room for another popup. This happened to Jori recently; Synder was killed, she looted the item, ghost wouldn't talk to her, but she backed up into the room and got a popup (apparently she'd missed one), spoke to the ghost, and completed the quest.

You're done. Epidipidoulos (or whatever) is by the lake near the Shon-To monastery outside of Moradhim. When you first talk to him, he'll ask if you're ready to reset your TP and CMS. You have to do this in order to pick your spells, so be ready. Then he'll give you an option of 3 spells — two similar to the one you picked at 49, and a new spell. Once you pick, he'll tell you to speak with Prodiga (or similar) in Klik Anon. The person is right next to the recruiter and will give you your weapon.
Good Healer:
## Episode 1

1️⃣ **Speak with the recruiter in Klik'Anon.**

2️⃣ Speak with **Ruddish the Devout** — Spider Mines (S/SW border), on the river bank.

3️⃣ Retrieve **two Summoner's Wands** from Froglok Slayers/Inquisitors in Burial Mounds (SW), near the river.

4️⃣ Return to Ruddish (although before you run all the way out to Ruddish, you may wish to complete step 5 first. So get your Wands and Warbeads, then return to Ruddish. Saves you a trip. You do not need your quest logged to get these drops — Janlynn).

5️⃣ Retrieve **two Enchanted Goblin Warbeads** in Guardian Forest (NW).

6️⃣ After collecting 2 warbeads from the goblins, you are sent to Lavastorm to farm fire basilisks for three kinds of ores: **smoldering bedrock**, **mesothermal platinum**, and **epithermal gold**.

7️⃣ Once you find them, you are instructed to fuse the ores by dropping them into a special lava location — Lavastorm (C), close to the edge where the landscape dips slightly downward. You will receive a popup here, triggering named millipedes. As you kill them, they eventually return to the lava as progressively harder ones spawn. Eventually, the **Megametamilipizon** spawns, dropping 4 NTL items. Cryptic Souls has killed the Megametamilipizon with as little as seven toons (SK, couple of necs, resist cleric, shammy).

**Note:** If you haven't started this quest yet, but are lucky enough to be able to loot a drop from the Megametamilipizon, it is possible to only complete steps 1–5 of this quest. With the Megametamilipizon drop, you can return to your quest NPC and complete the quest without ever farming for the lava drops. The lava drops are only to spawn the Mega.

---

## Episode 2

Speak with **Ruddish the Devout** — Spider Mines (S/SW border), on the river bank.

He sends you to Tak'Xiv (C) to slay **Sothimus the Brigand**. Once there, you will find a camp of Desert Marauders / Pillagers / Henchmen. These enemies hit considerably hard; a tank with high AC and AGI is required — even then, the damage will range from around 250 to 400 per strike. Continue to farm them for one to three hours until Sothimus the Brigand spawns. Healers only need to be in the kill group for the AoE flag in order to advance their quest. No items are needed.

Return to Ruddish after your quest has been advanced.

He now sends you to procure **three toxic glands** — one of air, one of sea, and one of land. All three of these mobs con red to 60 and require minimal help to kill.

-- **AIR** — Plagued Forest Drake — South Toxxulia, near Shrixiv. Allegedly farm millipedes to spawn, but Yado finds that the fastest way to spawn a Plagued Forest Drake is to kill the Rancid Murkwoods.
coglin comments: I do know if you have to kill wildlife to spawn it, it's easiest to do in (N) and (NE) subzones.

-- **SEA** — Plagued Siren — Farm the Enchanting Sirens in The Vastly Deep (E), West Toxxulia (SW), or Kerra Isle (SW).

-- **LAND** — Plagued Kobold Hunter — roams in Stonebrunt Mountains (C), (S), & (SW).

Return to Ruddish with the three toxic glands.

Ruddish will now fuse the glands to form a **Rune of the Plagued**. After he gives it to you, he sends you to Odus to figure out what it is for. Upon inspection of the item, you see this:

"...evarg yretaw sih ot mih nruter dna ekal eht morf erutaerc degniw eht kees..."

It appears to be scrambled nonsense, but it is really this backwards:

"Seek the winged creature from the lake and return him to his watery grave"

Using this Rune of the Plagued, head to Stonebrunt Mountains (C) to search for a popup. It can be found near the eastern entrance to the Grizz Cave, near a large rock along the northern shore of the lake. To find the lake, bear right (East) around the large central mountain and continue North until you see it. Once you receive the popup, the rune will be replaced with an unscrambled one.

Return to Ruddish with the unscrambled rune.

Ruddish will now send you to trigger a dragon, **Cyrcalis**, in Stonebrunt Mountains. He gives you two options for killing the Dragon:

-- **Seek the runes**, scattered throughout Tunaria and Odus, so as to debuff the creature...
(TY Shorte & Coglin)
Rune of the Frost — Goblins, North Wilderlands & TFGs, perma (don't confuse it for frost rune, which drops from TFGs and will appear in misc in your inventory; it's blue coloured. Rune of Frost is a brown rune and will appear in your Tradeskills section of inventory).
Rune of Poison — Treant prisoners, Guardian Forest (NW).
Rune of Fire — Animated Lava/Basilisks, Lavastorm (epic mobs are marked; see legend at bottom).
Rune of Lightening — Frogloks in Burial Mounds and Guk.

**Note (TY Shorte and Wickedlyrics):** You don't need all four runes, as you can only combine 3 different runes for debuffing him. Different combinations will take away the nukes for those runes (ie. using the FR rune means he can't nuke with fire, using Frost means he can't nuke with ice, etc.). You don't even need all three if you think you have a strong enough force. For instance, combining the LR and FR runes makes the "Rune of Searing Electricity," which will take away his ability to nuke with LR/FR. In this case, just let your tank know to ensure his PR and CR are maxed as those would be the "undebuffed" nukes.

-- **Simply mobilize with a strong force...**
Two to three groups are required for an effective kill.

Return back to Stonebrunt Mountains to the location you received the popup to spawn the dragon. The dragon drops four (4) NO TRADE LORE items.

Return to Ruddish for your reward of **30 million XP and 10k tunar**.

---

## Episode 3

Starts from Ruddish the Devout in Spider Mine SW. He sends you to Lilla in RV who's on the west edge of the lake near a boulder. She screams bloody murder about her husband and you offer to help find him.
Go out the east entrance of RV (mind the werehunters) and go north 2 hills. **Biddleby** spawns there. Whoever talks to him first and gives him the pie is the only one who advances. There are no drops. He has a load of HP and hits tanks for around 150–500 per swing with a 2k nuke. He can be MT'd with a medium-sized force. Respawn can be anywhere from instant to 2 hours.

RIP Biddleby-CS

Head back to Ruddish; he sends you to the blessing rock (where you got the last two blessings) and you get a very.....interesting popup. Just to be clear, **RETURN TO THE ROCK WHERE ALL YOUR POPUPS HAVE BEEN BEFORE IN ORDER TO SPAWN AoH.** AoH will then spawn right across the river from Ruddish beside the tall, square stone with writings on it (TY Carmen for clarity).
Lanaz also comments on the location: Run straight across from Ruddish to the other side of the river, then run west a short distance until you come to the FLAT white rock. As you walk on the surface of this rock, you should receive the pop-up which gives you XP as well, so make sure you're BOONED.

RIP Avatar of Hate-CS

Prepare for debt, because you're about to have your rear end handed to you before you can get out of the dialogue. **Avatar of Hate** and his minions pop. No interesting drops off the minions.

AoH despawns after about a half hour, but you can repop him by walking by the rock again, and you have about 5 seconds to run before all the mobs pop again. AoH is top-notch raid mob quality. Have fun...! He is very hard to tank; let petters kite him, with melees and tanks using ranged weapons, and zerg. SK's use your Enshrouding Darkness as a DOT and to slow him down; throw on all your debuffs. Drops **8 Medallion of Innoruk**.

**Note:** If you already have a Medallion from either the Green Rift or Spider Mines (either Medallion works fine), all you have to do is head to the blessing rock. AoH will spawn. Wait a half hour, he'll despawn and **Errolisi Marr** will spawn, and you can talk to her (press square, or you'll just get the AoH popup and he'll respawn again despawning Errolisi Marr). She will accept your quest piece.

After defeating AoH, Errolisi Marr herself spawns by the rock. Turn in the quest piece to her for **73 mil XP** with no XP pot. She sends you off to Eripolus on the south side of the lake in Shon-To Monastery for your ability section of the quest.
Good Melee:
## Episode 1

1️⃣ Talk to the Recruiter in Klick A'non.

2️⃣ Go to Sensei Melinus. The Sensei can be found in Qeynos Prison (NE). He's standing on a very large hill next to a large rock.

3️⃣ Sensei sends you to Centaur Valley to obtain 2 Ghostly Goo. They drop off Wandering Gasts and Ghosts in Centaur Valley (E).

4️⃣ Return these to Sensei Melinus.

5️⃣ Retrieve two Enchanted Goblin Warbeads in Guardian Forest (NW).

6️⃣ Return these to Sensei Melinus.

7️⃣ Now head to Guk for 3 Pages of Pardon. The High Shaman is located inside Guk.

**Page 1 and 2:** Farm the Froglok Channelers/Foragers in any of the OUTSIDE camps. Eventually the Elder Froglok Guk Mystic drops page 1, the Elder Froglok Guk Diviner drops page 2 (con red at 60).

Page 1 can also be had by killing the Froglok Channelers/Foragers right off the Circle bridge inside GUK dungeon. There are two rooms in there; kill and keep all mobs fresh. Farm the one mob on the far left side in the back room, over and over again. Eventually the Elder GUK Mystic will spawn. He cons red to a 60. - TY Janlynn/Hardway.

Page 2 can also be had by killing the Froglok Channelers/Foragers inside Guk Dungeon and spawning the Elder Froglok Diviner. This is Verified!! Cons red to lvl 60.

**Note:** It is faster to farm pages 1 & 2 inside Guk rather than at the outside camps.

**Page 3:** Deep in Guk dungeon there are "Fungal Cavalier's and Fungal Hunter's." After killing these for a while an "Elder Fungal ..." will spawn in place of one of the cavalier/hunters. The elder drops page 3. This is Verified!!

After turning these pieces in to the High Shaman, you must protect the prisoner (See Map). Bring a full group, maybe a few extra. This part lasts about an hour. You get 6 waves of Froglok Bloodletters, which all con red, have a 1k crit, and 500 dot. The waves get progressively harder, with more spawning each round. The most I've noticed I think was 5 or 6 on the last round. After killing them, you get a pop up which will tell you to hold out a little longer. Just wait a few more minutes and the High Shaman will spawn again. At this point you'll have to go back to your Sensei (ensure your quest log says this), and you're done!! 20 Mil XP is the reward.

**NOTE:** If you fail protecting, just be around when another person is doing the protection part to further your quest.

---

## Episode 2

1️⃣ Talk to Celedonicus in Qeynos bard guild. Kill bandits in Tak Hiv (C) to farm 4 Sashes. Return to Celedonicus.

2️⃣ Talk to Jezia in Qeynos (SW), just outside the castle by a tree. Kill Slayers/Inquisitors in Burial Mounds (SW) to farm Jezia's Locket. Return to Jezia and deliver note in Freeport, then return to Celedonicus.

3️⃣ Talk to Adiliv in Arcadin near the pool inside the city. Kill Enchanting Sirens in Vastly Deep (E) to farm Adiliv's voice. Return to Adiliv.

4️⃣ Talk to Nicton in Gentar's Mine (E) in the dwarf camp with the tall tower just east of the coach. Kill Eyes in EG to farm an Eyelash. Return to Nicton.

5️⃣ Talk to Mervol in Davar Manor next to the tree by the coach. Pay Jebodan 5k (maybe more or less depending on your choice) in the manor house across from Mervol. Return to Mervol.

6️⃣ Return to Celedonicus in Qeynos bard guild.

7️⃣ Run up the coast from the castle to Qeynos (NW) to spawn Graal the Leviathan — BIG snake that moves from the land to the water. You can use some type of rune to get him in the water or on land, otherwise you can wait on land and kill him pretty easily. Graal drops four scales (Evil Tanks need also).

**NOTE:** You can bind him to either element with a Rune of Earth or Rune of Tide. Rune of Earth binds Graal to land and can be farmed at EG. Rune of Tide binds Graal to the sea and can be farmed at any of the new Siren camps. Graal is weak against disease spells, and for resists: PR.

Return the Scales to Celedonicus for your exp. (no item, armor or spell).

---

## Episode 3

1️⃣ Speak to Celedonicus in the Bard Guild of Qeynos after completing Epic-Sode 2.

2️⃣ He sends you to investigate what is terrorizing the Elves of Tethelin. Head to Fayspire Gate (C). You will see a large area of bluish ice. Walk up to it to get the 1st popup and then into the bluish ice to get the pop-up to spawn the mob, Ravenous Bear. He is killable with 2 groups. You get another pop-up after killing the bear; you may need to wander around the area to get it.

3️⃣ Head to Tethelin and speak to Gelledyn and you will get a pop-up about Vampires.

4️⃣ He sends you to the cave Greyvax Caves (NW). You will need many people to complete this part (at least 4 groups). You must get the blood of Randarith, Raldarith, and blood from Quil'Eyne. Randarith hits hard but has very low defense and dies fast. Raldarith has immense HP/AC/Resists. Both Vampires drop 8 bloods, needed by both archetypes.

Quil'Eyne is extremely hard... with a 2000 hit quad, 2000 nuke, 2000 critical, 2000 damage (looks like taunt) spell, and a small proc... he is very hard to MT. You can either use pets to zerg him or MT him. CS has found it much easier to just tank him (a little more effort to set up, but eliminates all deaths from zerging); just ensure you have enough patchers to cover the damage he puts out, and get the necessary debuffs on him. Ensure he stays below in the basement (even one side room has a defender in the basement, be careful). If your people are casting from the ramp and don't manage their aggro well, QE will aggro up the ramp, then you're at risk of adding the Defender/Protector which spawns at the top of the ramp. Once that guy gets involved you will be camped and die on the rez and have to run back. Kill him and loot the BLOOD (Quil'Eyne will drop 4 bloods and 4 journals. The journals are for evil tanks and bloods for good melees).

5️⃣ Return to Gelledyn in Tethelin and hand in the items. You receive experience.

6️⃣ Go to Sho-To Monastery. This is located straight east of Moradhim. You are directed to speak with Ediopolus, who stands on the SW shore of the lake before you enter the cave to the monastery. He purifies you by resetting all of your CM's and TP's (he warns you first) and then gives you a description and choice of the three abilities you qualify for.

7️⃣ Next you will be told to go speak to someone in Freeport or Klick 'Anon. The NPC in Klick is right next to the coachman and easy to find. She will give you your item reward.
Good Caster:
## Episode 1

1️⃣ Talk to the Recruiter in Klik'Anon.

2️⃣ Talk to Maji'kot in Elemental Towers (W), along the shoreline, close to a tower where the 55 Mage Spell Giver is located.

3️⃣ Get two Ghostly Goo's off powerful undead in Centaur Valley (E) — Wandering Spectres and Wandering Ghosts. Head north up the river, along the east side from Blackwater. You will eventually see the broken bridge with the undead mobs on both sides.

4️⃣ Return the goo to Magi'kot and he tells you next he'll need two enchanted war beads, which are from goblins in Guardian Forest (NW). When I first got there it was a roaming sea of light blue goblin assassins and soothsayers. After a few minutes of killing them, the camp spawned yellow/white versions of these around a fixture which in the middle has an Elder goblin spawn, which didn't drop anything different than the regular mobs. Farm these until you have two of the beads.

5️⃣ Upon returning the beads to Magi'kot, you are sent on the final step of this first epic-sode — finding the heart and brain of Aktana the Flamekissed, and bringing back his soul. Lavastorm Mountains (E). You will need to farm Animated Lava. After getting the heart, head north to a Gargoyle statue of Aktana. Place the heart into the statue and it will become an unconnable roamer. Run north around the mountain to find a group of Gargoyle Patrollers that have now spawned. Farm these patrollers until a Fire Imp Protector spawns, which will eventually drop the Brain. Return to the unconnable statue to spawn Aktana the Flamekissed from a popup. Return to Magi'kot with Aktana's Soul to receive 20 million XP.

**NOTE: IF YOU ALREADY HAVE THE AKTANA LOOT FROM A PREVIOUS KILL**
If you already have loot on Flamekiss, all that you need to do is farm up the heart, talk to the gargoyle, RH, and turn in the soul. This goes for the other classes that need and have the soul pre-looted. You do not have to farm up the Imps again for the brain. (TY Monoxxide, Psychopathic Rydaz on CLW)

---

## Episode 2

Start off talking to Magi in Element Towers (W). He tells you to stop bandit problems in FP. Go to FP, out the north gate (by the blacksmith), and wait for the 3 bandits to spawn. Make sure you have 500 tunar on you so they can pick your pockets (otherwise you won't get the popup). The spawn time is variable; the 3 bandits walk from the north gate, through FP, and out by the coach, then despawn. That is all the time you have to assemble your group and kill them. If you get the popup etc. but don't succeed, don't worry — you can just wait for the next respawn and try again. You don't need to kill all 3 bandits, just the one in the middle (the brigand), and loot his coinpurse. **NOTE:** You must be in the KS group for the brigand to advance your quest.

Return to the Magi, he will tell you to get 3 gems to summon Vylimuza.

To get the 3 gems you will need 6 fragments in all:

* 3 are random drops off Enchanting Sirens in Kerra (SW), West Toxx (SW), and the Vastly Deep (E);
* you'll need to loot 3 keys from the Sirens to open the chests, which is where you will find the other three gems. The easiest way to get your keys is to keep farming sirens until you have three keys in your inventory, then travel to each of the three siren locations and open your chests.
* **Note on farming sirens:** a tank has a hard time at sirens due to their mana-sucking power. The easiest way is a 3 pet group with resist cleric — you can send the pets right in; they won't aggro the sirens beside the one you are killing. Alchs are handy at sirens with their breathe water pots, and Ench are pretty handy if they come with a Rhino 🙂

In your inventory now, you should have all six fragments:

**Logic, Passion, Complacency, Calculation, Motivation, and Restraint.**

Now, buy a standard Jeweler kit (any kit) and fuse your gems as follows:

* Logic + Calculation
* Passion + Motivation
* Complacency + Restraint

After that you'll have 3 gems, all ready to turn in to the Magi.

When you turn them in, you have to fight Vylimuza of the Tide. Vylimuza crits for 1200, melees for 1020, has a 1k AoE, and nukes for 363 with very high HP — you'll need a raiding party for this. CR nukes are only nukes (400 with max CR).

After the Tide is dead, loot your soul up and turn in.

You'll get 10k, flagged for the last part, and 35 million XP.

---

## Episode 3

Talk to Magi`Kot. He sends you to find Boldunder in the deserts of Odus.

Head to North Barren Coast (C). At the base of a hill, near a large depression, you should get a popup telling you that you feel the ground rumbling. Walking away from the hill toward the depression, you should get two more popups, then Boldunder spawns and tears you a new one.

You'll need a good-sized force to take out Boldunder. He resists all nukes and hits hard. We had a 60 SHA kite him without too much trouble, but it took a while to bring him down.

**Note:** CS finds it easiest to just MT Boldunder; Mory tanked him without too much trouble, and tanking him is a much more efficient and time-saving tactic.

He drops 4 souls. Bring one back to Mag`Kot, and share the rest with the nice folks who got owned along with you.

**Note:** If you're having trouble with your popups, or just want to respawn Boldunder to farm or to get more drops, just delete your quest and relog with Magi'Kot and you're set to go.

When you turn in the soul, Magi`Kot tells you to speak with him again to port to the Plane of Sky to witness the ultimate summoning.

Gather up a sizable raid force (20+). The Good Caster doing the quest will hand out gems that will port you to PoS (the usual first island, where the Isle of Wonder port is). Once everyone's ready, talk to Magi`Kot again, and he'll spawn Ahriaana the Ultimate. She looks like a gigantic ghilan, but fights like Boldunder on steroids. Since the update, nukes do damage!

She is, so far, impossible to MT (those she has aggro on, she ports off the island), and takes forever to kite (over an hour). CS has done her a few times and finds the best way to kill her is to just pet her — it takes around half an hour to kill her this way: have all casters send in pets to attack at the same time. Keep a secondary pet on your spell bar as your first pet might die so quickly that the recast time on your first pet hasn't been met. Don't HoT your pet, or when the pet dies she'll follow the aggro back to you. Just keep recasting pets (have the two biggest pets on your toolbar) and sending them in against her. Tanks shouldn't taunt, just do melee damage, and SK's should use all their debuffs on the mob. If you don't kill her within one hour, she full heals.

She does port people who have aggro (not all the time) — meet up with the Good Caster quester next time they get killed and get another gem to go back. Anyway, kill her. She'll drop 8 "torn journal page"s for 8 lucky questers. After she's dead (take an XP pot), head NW of the IoW port to talk to Magi`Kot's ghost (roams near pagoda).

**Note:** If you got a drop from Ahriaana but weren't on that part of your epic, and now you are, this is how you complete your quest: The Magi'kot in Elemental Towers will send you to PoS. Speak to him again up there and spawn Ahriaana. If you wait an hour she will despawn and the ghost will appear. Take an XP pot, speak to the ghost and turn in your torn page. The ghost spawns at a different spot from Magi — he spawns on the opposite side of the pagoda and roams.

You're done! Visit your quest NPC by the lake near the Shon-To Monastery outside of Moradhim. When you first talk to him he'll ask if you're ready to reset your TP and CM's (be prepared). Then he'll give you an option of 3 spells — two are similar to the one you picked at 49, and a new spell. Then you'll be sent to another NPC to get your weapon.
Evil Tank:
## Episode 1

1️⃣ Talk to the Recruiter in Freeport, southwest of the coach, under the tent. He sends you to Ozma Da Basher (although your quest log will show no quest).

2️⃣ Go to Ozma Da Basher, Oggok Gate (S) [five minute run directly west from Kerplunk]. When he says he can kill you without trying, believe him — he will deathtouch you if you don't.

3️⃣ Retrieve two Summoner's Wands from Froglok Slayers/Inquisitors in Burial Mounds (SW), near the river. Easy drop — you can acquire both in about an hour's worth of farming.

4️⃣ Return to Ozma Da Basher.

5️⃣ Kill Treants in Guardian Forest (SW) to retrieve two Enchanted Treant Branches. They are located both atop a hill with a stonehenge in the center **AND** on the hill northeast of that one. This camp used to be very complicated to spawn, but since the Class Balancing update, they've fixed it.

**NOTE:** To stop the treants from occasionally despawning, kill the Treant Prisoner before he reaches the top of the NE hill. Keep him fresh.

6️⃣ You are now sent to Lavastorm to farm Fire Basilisks for three kinds of ores: **Smoldering Bedrock, Mesothermal Platinum, and Epithermal Gold.** See note below in number 7.

7️⃣ Once you find them, you are instructed to fuse the ores by dropping them into a special lava location — Lavastorm (C), close to the edge where the landscape dips slightly downward. You will receive a popup here, triggering named millipedes. As you kill them, they eventually return to the lava as progressively harder ones spawn. Eventually, the **Megametamilipizon** spawns, dropping 4 NTL items.

**Note:** If you haven't started this quest yet, but are lucky enough to loot a drop from the Megametamilipizon, it is possible to only complete steps 1–5 of this quest. With the Megametamilipizon drop, you can return to your quest NPC and complete the quest without ever farming for the lava drops. The lava drops are only to spawn the Mega.

🎉 You receive **20 Mil XP** after handing in the items.

---

## Episode 2

1️⃣ Talk to Ozmo the Basher to log the quest. He sends you to Tak'Xiv (C) to farm Desert Marauders for four sashes. These mobs have huge aggro and hit hard (high AC) — be careful pulling or you'll get adds.

2️⃣ Ozmo sends you to Neriak (S), just west of the coachman, to Tilvyis. Tilvyis sends you to Vastly Deep (E) to farm Enchanting Sirens for a key that will let you loot from their chest a **Breastplate of Superiority**. Sirens mana tap. Easiest way to pull: tank pulls one, mage pet taunts off, tank swims away to get next one while group kills. Sirens don't hit hard, so this is the simplest way to protect mana and keep pull rate up (way to go Prestosifto!). Have good AR.

3️⃣ Then go to Great Waste (N) and farm Taksehir Crystal Runners for **Leggings of Superiority**.

4️⃣ Go back to Tilvyis and hand them in. He'll send you to get **Boots of Excellence** from any of the TFG camps and ONE Ghostly Goo from Centaur Valley undead camps.

5️⃣ Hand those in to Tilvyis. Now he asks you for **Gloves of Power and Protection**. Farm any of the Animated Lava camps in Lavastorm Mountains (SE).

6️⃣ Take a group with you when you return to Tilvyis. After you turn in your gloves, you will have to fight him. He will start hitting before you've even finished reading the popups. He hits hard, but is easy with just a group. He respawns — talk to him (he's actually quite funny). You receive a **Level 65 Breastplate of Superiority — 420 AC, STA 40, HP 100+**.

7️⃣ Go to Ozmo the Basher, then back to Tilvyis. Talk to him and he sends you to rid Qeynos of a Sea Serpent eating all the Neriak spies. Bring a large force for this. **Graal the Leviathan** spawns in Qeynos (NW). He can port between water and land — if you don't kill him fast enough and he ports, he heals. You can bind him to either element with a rune farmed from EG. He drops four NTL scales (Good Melees need this drop as well).

**NOTE:** You can bind him to either element with a **Rune of Earth** or **Rune of Tide**. Rune of Earth binds Graal to land and can be farmed at EG. Rune of Tide binds Graal to the sea and can be farmed at any of the new Siren camps. Graal is weak against disease spells, and for resists: PR.

🎉 Turn in the scale to Tilvyis for **24 Mil XP and 10k tunar**.

---

## Episode 3

1️⃣ Speak to Ty'lvis after completing Epic-Sode 2.

2️⃣ He sends you to investigate what is terrorizing the Elves of Tethelin.

3️⃣ Go north until you are in Fayspire Gate (C). You will see a circle of bluish ice. Walk up to it to get the first popup and then step into the bluish ice to get the popup to spawn the mob. **Ravenous Bear** cons red to a 60 and is easily killed with 2 groups.

4️⃣ Head to Tethelin and run to the only mob that is "White Faced," Gelledyn, and you will get a pop-up about Vampires.

5️⃣ Return to Ty'lvis. He sends you to Greyvax Caves (NW) — the actual caves. Bring an army for this — preferably petters because the final mobs are extremely hard to MT.

6️⃣ You must get the blood of **Randarith**, **Raldarith**, and a journal from **Quil'Eyne**. Randarith hits hard but has very low defense and dies fast. Raldarith has immense HP/AC/Resists — almost all abilities will do 0 damage, but not too hard to MT. Randarith and Raldarith both drop 8 bloods, needed by both archetypes.

7️⃣ Quil'Eyne is extremely hard — with a 2000 hit quad, 2000 nuke, 2000 critical, 2000 damage (looks like taunt) spell, and a small proc — he is very hard to MT. You can either use pets to zerg him or MT him. CS has found it much easier to just tank him (a little more effort to set up, but eliminates all deaths from zerging). Just ensure you have enough patchers to cover the damage he puts out and get the necessary debuffs on him. Ensure he stays below in the basement (even one side room has a defender in the basement — be careful). If your peeps are casting from the ramp and don't manage their aggro well, QE will aggro up the ramp, then you're at risk of adding the Defender/Protector which spawns at the top of the ramp. Once that guy gets involved you will be camped, die on the rez, and have to run back. Kill him and loot the BLOOD (Quil'Eyne will drop 4 bloods and 4 journals. The journals are for evil tanks and bloods for good melees).

8️⃣ Return to Ty'lvis and hand in items. You receive **100 Mil experience**. He sends you to Sho-Ton Monastery (run NE from Hatespike), outside Moradhim, to speak to Epidopolous who stands beside the lake. He will ask if you are ready to have your masteries and training points reset. Then you will choose between the 3 abilities. He is very specific about your abilities and the descriptions to help you choose.
Evil Healer:
## Episode 1

1️⃣ Talk to the Recruiter in Freeport, southwest of the coach, under the tent.

2️⃣ Go to Basher's Enclave (E) and talk to the Seer Yalgima.

3️⃣ Retrieve two Summoner's Wands from Froglok Slayers/Inquisitors in Burial Mounds (SW), near the river.

4️⃣ Return to the Seer Yalgima.

5️⃣ Kill Treants in Guardian Forest (SW) to retrieve two Enchanted Treant Branches. They are located both atop a hill with a stonehenge in the center **AND** on the hill northeast of that one. This camp used to be very complicated to spawn, but since the Class Balancing update, they've fixed it.

**NOTE:** To stop the treants from occasionally despawning, kill the Treant Prisoner before he reaches the top of the NE hill. Keep him fresh.

6️⃣ Now head to Guk for 3 Pages of Pardon. The High Shaman is located inside Guk.

**Page 1 and 2:** Farm the Froglok Channelers/Foragers in any of the OUTSIDE camps. Eventually the Elder Froglok Guk Mystic drops Page 1, and the Elder Froglok Guk Diviner drops Page 2 (cons red at 60).

Page 1 can also be obtained by killing the Froglok Channelers/Foragers right off the Circle bridge inside Guk dungeon. There are two rooms there — kill and keep all mobs fresh. Farm the one mob on the far left side in the back room repeatedly. Eventually the Elder GUK Mystic will spawn. He cons red to a 60. — TY Janlynn/Hardway.

Page 2 can also be obtained by killing the Froglok Channelers/Foragers inside Guk Dungeon and spawning the Elder Froglok Diviner. This is VERIFIED!! Cons red to level 60.

**Note:** It is faster to farm Pages 1 & 2 inside Guk rather than at the outside camps.

**MAP TO PLACEHOLDERS INSIDE GUK TO FARM PAGES 1 & 2**

**Page 3:** Deep in Guk dungeon there are "Fungal Cavalier's" and "Fungal Hunter's." After killing these for a while, an "Elder Fungal ..." will spawn in place of one of the Cavalier/Hunters. The elder drops Page 3. This is VERIFIED!!

After turning these pieces in to the High Shaman, you must protect the prisoner (see map). Bring a full group, maybe a few extra. This part lasts about an hour. You get 6 waves of Froglok Bloodletters, which all con red, have a 1k crit, and a 500 DoT. The waves get progressively harder, with more spawning each round. The most I've noticed was 5 or 6 on the last round. After killing them, you get a popup telling you to hold out a little longer. Just wait a few more minutes and the High Shaman will spawn again. At this point you'll have to go back to your Sensei (ensure your quest log says this), and you're done!!

🎉 **Reward: 20 Mil XP**

**NOTE:** If you fail protecting, just be around when another person is doing the protection part to further your quest.

---

## Episode 2

The quest starts at Seer Yalgima in Basher's Enclave (NE). She tells you to go to Freeport and kill the Bandits and bring back a coinpurse. In FP, a Bandit Henchman and Brigand will spawn outside the northgate. The spawn time is variable — just park your group there and wait. You must have at least 500 tunar on you for them to steal to get the popup and get flagged. Get close to them (they will not attack), get the popup, then kill them. The Brigand drops the Coinpurse (he drops 3). Loot one and return to Seer Yalgima.

Then she asks you to get her 2 undead souls.

The first one can be found in Centaur Valley north of Black Water. Farm across the river further down — after farming 4 undead mobs, eventually a Wandering Spectre (cons red) spawned on top of us. It has the Soul of a Wandering Spectre, NTL. Loot it.

The second soul is in Dead Hills (NW), where the PoD portal is. The placeholder to farm is the mob at the south corner of the south tomb. Farm the LB mob there until a Red Derelict Mummy spawns. When you kill him, there is a chance you will spawn a Derelict Mummy's Soul. If he spawns, he'll spawn right on top of you immediately when the first one dies — be prepared.

**Note:** Yado informs us there is another spot you can farm your placeholder in Dead Hills (south), again on a hill with a tomb on top. The PH is the left one.

Then she asks you to go get the plagued gland from the Plagued Siren. This mob can be found at any of the Siren camps in Odus. She then tells you she is going to use the 2 souls you brought her earlier to call out the ancient soul. This mob is found exactly NW of the Seer, on a hill between one swampy lake, standing by a tree. He looks like a skeletal giant. This mob resists everything except fire-based spells.

**Notes:** Dead Hills (S) — it's a crypt on purplish colored ground. Red Derelict Mummy spawned; as soon as he dropped, a Derelict Mummy's Soul spawned.

---

## Episode 3

Start off by speaking with Yalgima in Basher's Enclave.

She tells you to speak with Kraznak (who is west of her, next to a rock — TY Yado). When you speak with Kraznak he tells you to speak with the spirits. The spirits spawn right next to Kraznak in 15 minute intervals. After speaking with Kraznak the first spirit will not spawn for 15 minutes. **DO NOT MOVE.** There are three spirits in total, plus Kraznak must respawn after speaking with the third spirit, so be prepared to sit there for an hour.

The first spirit spawns towards the south. Read the text and progress through the popups. On the first spirit there are no choices to make, so don't exit the screen or you may mess it up.

You will have different response options for the next two spirits. You must choose the correct response or you have to start over (i.e., speak to Kraznak and wait 15 minutes again).

The second spirit spawns facing west and you must choose the **third option** from reply (something to the effect of the spirits being upset). If you choose the wrong option, you must wait for Kraznak to spawn and start over. After this, in 15 more minutes the next one will spawn.

(Kraznak spawned at this point, but I didn't talk to him.)

The third and final spirit spawns facing southeast. You choose the **second option** (something about a spirit escaping). After that you speak to Kraznak again. Next step is the final encounter.

Go to Cape Dreg (SE). From SoM just run/swim east — it's a pretty long swim to get out there. You will see a pirate ship. That is the island you want. When you go inside the building, follow the path around to the right and you will drop down through the floor. This will trigger the beginning of the waves. This is similar to the waves in Guk, but the mobs are a lot tougher. Once this starts, the door at the top of the ramp will be sealed so no one can get out (it does open briefly between wave spawns, but no one should leave anyway). After 4–5 waves, Synder of the Indigo will spawn.

**Wave Breakdown:**
- 1st wave: Spirits of Syndar — weak against PR/DR (from what casters said)
- 2nd wave: Syndar Manifestations — weak against CR (from what casters said)
- 3rd wave: Spirits of Syndar — weak against FR (from what casters said)
- 4th wave: Syndar Manifestations — weak against PR/DR (from what casters said)
- 5th wave: Syndar Incantations (unknown weakness)

*See note below on how to farm Syndar.*

This guy is bad ass. With 4k AC he quads for 1k and nukes. MT him — with rhinos he won't be much problem. After Synder is defeated he will drop 8 necklaces. Loot a necklace and speak with the Ghost that spawns **ASAP** (have everyone dismiss pets so you can target the ghost). The ghost has been known to depop rather quickly. The ghost spawns right next to the little cubby on the floor.

Gokukicks says: Snyder debuffs your FR by 125 and has an FR-based proc, so his quads are very high once he debuffs you — but overmax your FR by 125 and he's a wimp and easy to tank.

Once he is dead, collect his loot, **TALK TO HIS GHOST** (spawns in the cubby under the ramp; the ghost despawns quickly), and go talk to Shinlos.

**Note:** If you think you've gotten all the popups, looted the necklace, and the ghost WON'T talk to you, back out of the cubby and try roaming around the room for another popup. This happened to Jori recently — ghost wouldn't talk to her, but she backed up into the room and got a popup (apparently she'd missed one); spoke to ghost and completed the quest.

After you speak with the ghost you receive a letter and must go back to Basher's Enclave. This is the part where you will receive XP, so this is where you will want to use your XP pot if you have one. Reward is **100 Mil XP** without pots. To collect your spell you are sent to Shon-To Monastery (a zone east of Moradhim) to speak with Epidolous. This is where you will receive the rehab. After the rehab you then get to choose your spell/ability. Lastly, you are sent to FP or Klik to receive your weapon/armor reward. The reward giver is located south of the coach.

---

### Farming Syndar

Yado explains his trick to farm Syndar (many people want to farm epic mobs for the epic loot they drop). Advance your quest to the point of being able to farm Syndar. Get out to Cape Dreg (SE) and have your raid crew set up in the room below (you stay outside until everyone is set). Once your raid force is ready, enter and proceed down the ramp, get the popup to spawn Syndar, but don't proceed any further down the ramp so that you don't get any more popup flags. When Syndar spawns, delete your quest from the log. Relog the quest with Yalgima in Basher's Enclave, do the Kraznak spirit talking portion again, and you're set to spawn Syndar again. Happy farming.

### Farming AoH

Ozmoseus explains that AoH is a great mob to farm for epic loot. He's easy to set up for, easy to MT, and can be repeated easily in about half an hour. Once AoH is spawned and killed (**don't LOOT!!!**), simply delete the quest and speak with Animator Jen'Tylis in Green Rift (W). Do the first part of the quest (FP, fungus, & Biddleby) and you're set to redo AoH. Happy farming.
Evil Melee:
## Episode 1

1️⃣ Talk to the Recruiter in Freeport, southwest of the coach, under the tent.

2️⃣ He sends you to Rashiroz the Rogue located in North Kithicor (C).

3️⃣ You are sent to The Great Waste to procure 2 Glowing Crystals. To do so, farm the Taksehir Miners - Great Waste (W).

4️⃣ Return the two Glowing Crystals to Rashiroz the Rogue.

5️⃣ Kill Treants in Guardian Forest (SW) to retrieve two Enchanted Treant Branches. They are located both atop a hill with a stonehenge in the center **AND** on the hill northeast of that one.

**STRATEGY:** To get everything to spawn, you must let the Treant Prisoner and the Goblin Prisoner **LIVE**, DO NOT KILL THEM. After the Treant Prisoner makes it to the stonehenge, light blue conned Treant Defenders and Diviners will start spawning in the nearby woods — you must kill these to get the higher level ones to spawn, which con White and Yellow. Those drop the **BRANCHES** you need, even though your quest log requires Barks.

**NOTE:** If you let the Treant Prisoner make it to the first rise before the Stones, and you see the NPC chat in Say occur, you can kill the Treant Prisoner and keep him fresh. Do not let the body disappear; also, do **not** kill the Goblin Prisoner. This way, you should get spawns every 10 minutes or so.

**NOTE 2:** There is a semi-insta spawned Treant Diviner on the north side of the hill with the stonehenge.

**NOTE 3:** There is an insta spawned Treant Diviner on the hill NE of the one with the stonehenge. Be sure to keep looting the insta after you kill it, or it will stop insta'n. You must loot it before killing the next one.

6️⃣ Upon returning the branches to Rashiroz the Rogue, you are sent on the final step of this first epic-sode — finding the Heart and Brain of Aktana the Flamekissed, and bringing back his soul in Lavastorm Mountains (E). You will need to farm Animated Lava. After getting the heart, head north to a Gargoyle statue of Aktana. Place the heart into the statue and it will become an unconnable roamer. Run north around the mountain to find a group of Gargoyle Patrollers that have now spawned. Farm these patrollers until a Fire Imp Protector spawns, which will eventually drop the Brain. Return to the unconnable statue to spawn Aktana the Flamekissed via a popup. Return to Magi'kot with Aktana's Soul to receive **20 million XP**.

**NOTE:** IF YOU ALREADY HAVE THE AKTANA LOOT FROM A PREVIOUS KILL — if you already have loot on Flamekiss, all you need to do is farm the heart, talk to Garg, RH, and turn in soul. This applies for other classes that need and have the soul pre-looted. You do not need to farm the Imps again for the brain. (TY Monoxxide, Psychopathic Rydaz on CLW)

---

## Episode 2

1️⃣ Rashiroz the Rogue starts you off by sending you to kill the bandits that come to the north gate of FP every few hours, much like the good caster epic. Evil Melee needs the coin purse dropped by the brigand and must talk to one of the henchmen.

2️⃣ Rashiroz the Rogue now tells you he wants to summon Vylinnuza, and you need to help him get her consciousness. The consciousness is in three parts, but must be constructed together using six items. You will need a jewelry kit (level 0 skill in jewelcrafting is fine) and the correct combination of items. If crafted incorrectly, they will disappear.

The mobs you need to farm are Enchanting Sirens. There are three camps: Vastly Deep (E), Kerra Isle (SW), and West Toxx (SW). Each camp contains two sets of four mobs with a treasure chest (blank con) in the middle. Farming the sirens yields a NTL key. **Important note:** The three keys are indistinguishable but correspond to different chests. Farm until you have three keys in inventory, then test each chest.

**Items needed:**
- Fragment of Logic — random drop at all three camps
- Fragment of Passion — random drop at all three camps
- Fragment of Restraint — random drop at all three camps
- Fragment of Calculation — chest reward at Kerra Isle camp
- Fragment of Motivation — chest reward at Vastly Deep camp
- Fragment of Complacency — chest reward at West Toxx camp

**Crafting combos with a jewelcrafting kit:**
- Complacency + Restraint
- Logic + Calculation
- Motivation + Passion

You will create three NTL gems: Turquoise, Azure, and Cobalt. Return to Rashiroz the Rogue, who will give you a NTL equippable robe, which you use to disguise yourself and trick Magi'Kot in Elemental Towers (W) into summoning. Bring your raid force.

3️⃣ Raid force? Magi'Kot despawns and summons Vylinnuza of the Tide. She walks in from the north, crits for 1200, melees for 1020, nukes for 400 (with max CR and LR), AoEs for 1000, and has tons of HP. She resists all nukes except lightning (reduced damage). At 1–2 reds left, she hits the tank much harder. You need 5–8 healers to MT her, tank with max CR/LR, high AC and AGI.

💎 Killing her gives **860k XP** for a group of 60s. She drops four NTL Vylinnuza's Soul items.

**Reward:** 30 Mil XP and 10k tunar.

---

## Episode 3

Return to Rashiroz the Rogue. He sends you to find Boldunder in the deserts of Odus.

Head to North Barren Coast (C). At the base of a hill near a large depression, you get a popup saying you feel the ground rumbling. Walking away from the hill toward the depression triggers two more popups, then Boldunder spawns.

You'll need a good-sized force to take out Boldunder. He resists all nukes and hits hard. He can be kited, but it's easier to MT him (minimum toons: 4 necs, stack cleric, 3 alchs for recon). He drops 4 souls. Bring one back to Rashiroz the Rogue, share the rest with your group. Rashiroz sends you back to Magi'Kot in Elemental Towers.

Magi'Kot tells you to speak with him again to port to the Plane of Sky (PoS) to witness the ultimate summoning.

Gather a sizable raid force. The Evil Melee doing the quest hands out gems that port you to PoS (first island, Isle of Wonder port). Once ready, speak to Magi'Kot again — he spawns Ahriaana the Ultimate. She looks like a gigantic ghilan, but fights like Boldunder on steroids. Nukes now do damage.

She is very difficult to MT (ports those with aggro off the island) and takes over an hour to kite. Best strategy: use pets to kill her — have all casters send pets at once. Keep a secondary pet for recast. Do **not** HoT pets. Tanks should not taunt, just melee. Debuffs: shamans, SK armor drain, Merc debuffs, rogue debuffs.

She ports players with aggro occasionally. Kill her — she drops 8 "Torn Journal Pages" for 8 questers.

**Important Note (TY Gruphugz, Minstrel, CLW):** Evil Melees do **not** need to talk to Magi'Kot's ghost. After Ahriaana is dead, loot and RH, then speak to your epic NPC (Rashiroz the Rogue) to complete the quest.

**Note:** If you got a drop from Ahriaana but weren't on that part of your epic, and now you are, complete the quest by speaking to Magi'Kot in Elemental Towers, spawn Ahriaana, RH, and then go speak to your epic NPC.

🎉 After getting your quest XP, go to Shon-To Monastery for ability reward and training point/CM reset. Two ability choices continue your class path; the third is a broken path option. Then head to FP for your item choices.

**Rogue Ability Reward**
Evil Caster:
## Episode 1

1️⃣ Talk to the Recruiter in Freeport, southwest of the coach, under the tent.

2️⃣ You are sent to speak with Animator Jen'Tylis, located in The Green Rift (W), in a camp.

3️⃣ You are sent to The Great Waste to procure 2 Glowing Crystals. Farm the Taksehir Miners - Great Waste (W).

4️⃣ Return the two Glowing Crystals to Animator Jen'Tylis.

5️⃣ Kill Treants in Guardian Forest (SW) to retrieve 2 Enchanted Treant Branches. They are atop a hill with a stonehenge and on the hill northeast of that one.

**STRATEGY:** Let the Treant Prisoner and Goblin Prisoner live. After the Treant Prisoner reaches the stonehenge, light blue conned Treant Defenders and Diviner spawn — kill these to get higher level ones (White/Yellow con) which drop the **BRANCHES**.

*NOTE:* If the Treant Prisoner reaches the first rise before the Stones and NPC chat occurs, you can kill him and keep him fresh. Do not kill the Goblin Prisoner. Spawns occur every ~10 minutes.

*NOTE:* Semi-insta spawned Treant Diviner on the north side of the hill with the stonehenge.

*NOTE:* Insta spawned Treant Diviner on the hill NE of the stonehenge hill. Loot before killing next one.

6️⃣ Visit the herbalist in Guk, bottom past two bridges, right of the latter. He asks for 3 ingredients:
- Spotted Tongue: Frogluk Channelers/Foragers
- Congealed Swamp Water: Frogluk Channelers/Foragers
- Mycanoid Spores: Fungal Cavaliers/Hunters

7️⃣ Talking to the herbalist with ingredients initiates an event: protect him. Every 5 minutes, 2 mobs spawn for 3 rounds (~15 minutes each), lasting ~1 hour.

**Spawn order & cons:**
- Watchmen: dark blue
- Guardsmen: white
- Lookout/Scout: yellow/red
- Eventually, Bouncers spawn (red con, very difficult)

During the chaos, the herbalist gives a teleportation shard and ports you to Guk (S), where Severupidus spawns. Speak to him for a potion.

*NOTE:* If herbalist dies, wait for another player to trigger event. Quest still advances if items are in inventory.

Return to Animator Jen'Tylis for **20 million XP**.

---

## Episode 2

Speak to Jen'Tylis in Green Rift (W), next to the well in Gal'Saris camp.

He says: "Go to Tak'Xiv West, take out the bandit leader, take his coins, and bring them to me."

Destination: Tak'Xiv (C), west of Oasis. Farm Desert Marauders/Pillagers/Henchmen along the river until **Sothimus the Brigand** spawns. Kill and loot the coin purse.

*NOTE:* Good healers recommended; evil casters only need coin purse.

Return to Jen'Tylis with coin purse.

Next: procure an Engraved Ring from Enchanting Sirens at one of three camps:
- Vastly Deep (E)
- Kerra Isle (SW)
- West Toxxulia (SW)

Each camp: 8 mobs (2 sets of 4) with treasure chest (blank con) in center. Farming yields NTL keys — 3 waterlogged keys required to open chests.

*NOTE:* Kill Plagued Siren for its gland for later debuff.

Return to Jen'Tylis with Engraved Ring.

Next: Search for Ualdius's ghost near Vox Castle ice cave. Ualdius sends you to find and kill **Teledic** in Vox Castle.

Proceed through main entrance (Bridge) → room with 4 passageways → take NORTH passage → room with fountain → north wall right passage. Teledic spawns, roams nearby. Quads solid tank for 200–300, fire DS 500, nuke 860, self-heals, high AC/AGI. Resist cleric/druid, tank, and damage (pets) required. Return to Jen'Tylis after kill.

Next: Qeynos Prison (E), central dungeon, talk to **Calidux** (next to Ulthud the Wall). You must slay the undead menace in Basher's Enclave (N) — mob: "An Ancient Corpse".

Choice: find toxic siren gland (Kerra Isle SW) for debuff potion or slay the beast. If gland collected, 1 group needed due to high AC/AGI. 4 NTL Ancient Corpse souls drop — return one to Calidux.

*NOTE:* Debuff requires questor to approach AaC until popup appears. No one may engage before popup.

After acquiring soul, Calidux betrays you (KoS). Group needed to finish him. Loot **Alizander's Journal** and return to Jen'Tylis.

Reward: **30 million XP** and **10,000 tunar**.

---

## Episode 3

1️⃣ Log quest from Animator Jen'Tylis in Green Rift (W).

2️⃣ Travel to Freeport and speak to **Serverudipus** in caster area. Watch for Rea Werebeasts.

3️⃣ Go to Guk, kill fungals for 1 Mycanoid Stem (stackable).

4️⃣ Return to Serverudipus in Freeport for pie.

5️⃣ Travel to Rivervale, speak to halfling **Biddleby** (S of east entrance on first hill). He takes pie, sends you back to Jen'Tylis.

6️⃣ Return to Jen'Tylis — next mob **Avatar of Hate** spawns in Green Rift. Drops 8 talismans:
- 2000 damage nuke (possibly AR)
- 1205 damage nuke (possibly PR)
- 500 damage taunt
- 350 damage AoE (possibly PR)

AoH spawns close to Jen'Tylis. Despawns 15–30 min if not damaged. Raid quality mob. Drops **8 Medallion of Innorok**. Return talismans to Jen'Tylis.

7️⃣ Travel to Spider Mines (SW) to find **Avatar of Love** west of Ruddish the Devout (north river). Speak to make attackable.

*NOTE:* Must be MTed.

**Strategy:** Unload all spells, melee, abilities. At 2/5 HP, she self-heals and casts damage shield. Dismiss pets, abilities only, no X button. Use secondary pet for recast. Kill within 2–3 min window before DS casts. Drops **8 Arrows of Love**.

8️⃣ Return to Jen'Tylis, turn in Arrows of Love for **100 million XP**. He directs you to **Shon-to Monastery** for rehab and ability, then to FP NPC for Epic Item.
